scope: Cycle 14 W5 sandbox prep disclosed 6 NOT-produced deliverables (README + req.lock + vram_ladder.hexa + rcsb_fetch.py + w5_verdict.py + sister-repo .git init). Cycle 15 (this) closes 4 of 6: scripts/rcsb_cluster_split_fetch.py (~250 LoC stdlib), scripts/w5_verdict.py (~200 LoC stdlib + biopython optional), tool/hexa_weave_vram_ladder.hexa (~150 LoC 4-rung dispatcher with raw 138 sentinel emission), proposals/hexa_weave_sister_repo_README_spec_2026_04_28.md (verbatim README spec for user heredoc dispatch). Remaining NOT-produced: requirements.lock (cycle 16) + sister-repo .git init (user dispatch). After cycle 15, user can issue 1-command W5 dispatch with all referenced scripts present (no script-not-found Step 6/8 fail).
